arts.ttl: Report: What people who have trained with Romeo Lavia have noticed about the Chelsea midfielder
Maresca: Chelsea can dominate the Premier League
arts.sum: "What I said to the owners and the sporting directors the first time I met them, because of the age, and because of how good the squad is, for me Chelsea in the next five to 10 years will be one of the teams, or the team, that is going to dominate English football. The emphasis could be on youth again at St Mary's on Wednesday when Chelsea face a Southampton team with the fifth-youngest average starting age this season, 26y 74d.

arts.ttl: How to watch Southampton vs Chelsea: TV channel, live stream details, kick off time
arts.sum: Southampton vs Chelsea in the Premier League is scheduled to kick off at the slightly strange time of 7:30pm in the UK at St Mary's Stadium on Wednesday, December 4. Southampton, in contrast, have won once all season and sit bottom by four points heading into the midweek set of fixtures.
